versions.version_description: This original version is different than the Cat Powers cover version in that the chord progression is slightly different.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
Sea of Love chords *
Robert Plant  1985 (Phil Phillips 1959)

https://en.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sea_of_Love_(Phil_Phillips_song)

[tab][ch]G[/ch]               [ch]B7[/ch]
Do you remember when we met?[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                [ch]A7[/ch]
That's the day I knew you were my pet[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]A7[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
I want to tell you how much I love you[/tab]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]             [ch]B7[/ch]
Come with me, my love[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]               [ch]A7[/ch]
To the sea, the sea of love[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]A7[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
I want to tell you just how much I love you[/tab]

[tab][ch]D[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]
Come with me, to the sea[/tab]
[tab][ch]B7[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]D7[/ch]
Of love[/tab]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]               [ch]B7[/ch]
Do you remember when we met?[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]                [ch]A7[/ch]
That's the day I knew you were my pet[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]A7[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]
I want to tell you oh how much I love you[/tab]

Break (key change)

[tab][ch]D[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]   [ch]D[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]
Come with me, to the sea[/tab]
[tab][ch]B7[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]   [ch]D7[/ch]
Of love[/tab]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]             [ch]B7[/ch]
Come with me, my love[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]               [ch]A7[/ch]
To the sea, the sea of love[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]A7[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] [ch]D[/ch]
I want to tell you just how much I love you[/tab]

[tab][ch]G[/ch]         [ch]D[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]A7[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch] 
I want to tell you just how much I love you[/tab]

* Alternates:

Capo II

[ch]G[/ch]  = [ch]F[/ch]
[ch]B7[/ch] = [ch]A7[/ch]
[ch]C[/ch]  = [ch]Bb[/ch]
[ch]A7[/ch] = [ch]G7[/ch]
[ch]D[/ch]  = [ch]C[/ch]
[ch]D7[/ch] = [ch]C7[/ch]

Open (These chords are not in the original key)

[ch]G[/ch]  = [ch]D[/ch]
[ch]B7[/ch] = [ch]F#7[/ch]
[ch]C[/ch]  = [ch]G[/ch]
[ch]A7[/ch] = [ch]E7[/ch]
[ch]D[/ch]  = [ch]A[/ch]
[ch]D7[/ch] = [ch]A7[/ch]

Set8
